entity.description: A door with a sign above it

effects.text: a solid metal door. An exit sign hangs above it.
The brass key turns in the door.
The door opens and disappears from the map.
You collect the brass key.
The red key unlocks the red door.
The red door opens and disappears from the map.
The green key unlocks the green door.
The green door opens and disappears from the map.
The blue key unlocks the blue door.
The blue door opens and disappears from the map.

entity.description: A switch that can trigger something.

effects.text: A red light glows above the unpressed button.
A green light glows above the pressed button.
The button clicks into place.
You hear a click at the exit door.
